items.title: Scotland Celebrates World Cup Return With Scott McTominay Bicycle Kick Banknote
items.summary: One of Scotland's great goals of recent times is being celebrated all the way to the bank to mark the nation’s long-awaited return to the World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Inter Miami say Messi went off with muscle fatigue
items.summary: Argentina star Lionel Messi was substituted during Inter Miami's Major League Soccer game on Sunday due to "muscle fatigue" in his left hamstring.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Home favourite Monfils bows out of French Open for last time after 21 years of thrills
items.summary: 39-year-old beaten 6-2, 6-3, 3-6, 2-6, 6-0 by Hugo Gaston Stan Wawrinka also loses in first round to Jesper de Jong Ninety minutes into Gaël Monfils’ dernière danse in the city...
